definition: valve with rotary motion with a closure member that is a sphere with an internal passage

definition_ml.en: valve with rotary motion with a closure member that is a sphere with an internal passage
definition_ml.de: Ventil mit Drehbewegung mit einem Drosselkörper, der aus einer Kugel mit innerem Durchgang besteht

note: The centre of the spherical surface is coincident with the axis of the shaft.

note_ml.en: The centre of the spherical surface is coincident with the axis of the shaft.
note_ml.de: Das Zentrum der Kugeloberfläche liegt in der Achse der Welle.
